data.description: Runs a language model given a specified provider.

base_url_ibm_watsonx.info: The base URL of the API (IBM watsonx.ai only)
base_url_ibm_watsonx.name: base_url_ibm_watsonx

input_value.info: The input text to send to the model
input_value.name: input_value

max_tokens.info: Maximum number of tokens to generate. Field name varies by provider.
max_tokens.name: max_tokens

ollama_base_url.info: Endpoint of the Ollama API (Ollama only). Defaults to http://localhost:11434
ollama_base_url.name: ollama_base_url

project_id.info: The project ID associated with the foundation model (IBM watsonx.ai only)
project_id.name: project_id

system_message.info: A system message that helps set the behavior of the assistant
system_message.name: system_message

data.description: Get chat inputs from the Playground.

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

files.info: Files to be sent with the message.
files.name: files

input_value.info: Message to be passed as input.
input_value.name: input_value
input_value.value: The growing demand for personalized, AI-driven mental health support tools that can provide real-time interventions and track long-term emotional well-being.

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

data.description: Implementation of Graph Vector Store using Astra DB

api_endpoint.info: API endpoint URL for the Astra DB service.
api_endpoint.name: api_endpoint

batch_size.info: Optional number of data to process in a single batch.
batch_size.name: batch_size

bulk_delete_concurrency.info: Optional concurrency level for bulk delete operations.
bulk_delete_concurrency.name: bulk_delete_concurrency

bulk_insert_batch_concurrency.info: Optional concurrency level for bulk insert operations.
bulk_insert_batch_concurrency.name: bulk_insert_batch_concurrency

bulk_insert_overwrite_concurrency.info: Optional concurrency level for bulk insert operations that overwrite existing data.
bulk_insert_overwrite_concurrency.name: bulk_insert_overwrite_concurrency

collection_indexing_policy.info: Optional JSON string for the "indexing" field of the collection. See https://docs.datastax.com/en/astra-db-serverless/api-reference/collections.html#the-indexing-option
collection_indexing_policy.name: collection_indexing_policy

collection_name.info: The name of the collection within Astra DB where the vectors will be stored.
collection_name.name: collection_name

keyspace.info: Optional keyspace within Astra DB to use for the collection.
keyspace.name: keyspace

metadata_incoming_links_key.info: Metadata key used for incoming links.
metadata_incoming_links_key.name: metadata_incoming_links_key

metadata_indexing_exclude.info: Optional list of metadata fields to exclude from the indexing.
metadata_indexing_exclude.name: metadata_indexing_exclude

metadata_indexing_include.info: Optional list of metadata fields to include in the indexing.
metadata_indexing_include.name: metadata_indexing_include

metric.info: Optional distance metric for vector comparisons in the vector store.
metric.name: metric

pre_delete_collection.info: Boolean flag to determine whether to delete the collection before creating a new one.
pre_delete_collection.name: pre_delete_collection

search_filter.info: Optional dictionary of filters to apply to the search query.
search_filter.name: search_filter

search_query.info: Enter a query to run a similarity search.
search_query.name: search_query

search_score_threshold.info: Minimum similarity score threshold for search results. (when using 'Similarity with score threshold')
search_score_threshold.name: search_score_threshold

setup_mode.info: Configuration mode for setting up the vector store, with options like 'Sync', or 'Off'.
setup_mode.name: setup_mode

should_cache_vector_store.info: If True, the vector store will be cached for the current build of the component. This is useful for components that have multiple output methods and want to share the same vector store.
should_cache_vector_store.name: should_cache_vector_store

token.info: Authentication token for accessing Astra DB.
token.name: token

data.description: Generate embeddings using a specified provider.

api_base.info: Base URL for the API. Leave empty for default.
api_base.name: api_base

base_url_ibm_watsonx.info: The base URL of the API (IBM watsonx.ai only)
base_url_ibm_watsonx.name: base_url_ibm_watsonx

dimensions.info: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported by certain models.
dimensions.name: dimensions

input_text.display_name: Include the original text in the output
input_text.name: input_text

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

project_id.info: IBM watsonx.ai Project ID (required for IBM watsonx.ai)
project_id.name: project_id

data.description: Create a prompt template with dynamic variables.

tool_placeholder.info: A placeholder input for tool mode.
tool_placeholder.name: tool_placeholder

data.description: Ingest and search documents in Astra DB

advanced_search_filter.info: Optional dictionary of filters to apply to the search query.
advanced_search_filter.name: advanced_search_filter

api_endpoint.info: The API Endpoint for the Astra DB instance. Supercedes database selection.
api_endpoint.name: api_endpoint

astradb_vectorstore_kwargs.info: Optional dictionary of additional parameters for the AstraDBVectorStore.
astradb_vectorstore_kwargs.name: astradb_vectorstore_kwargs

autodetect_collection.info: Boolean flag to determine whether to autodetect the collection.
autodetect_collection.name: autodetect_collection

collection_name.info: The name of the collection within Astra DB where the vectors will be stored.
collection_name.name: collection_name

content_field.info: Field to use as the text content field for the vector store.
content_field.name: content_field

database_name.info: The Database name for the Astra DB instance.
database_name.name: database_name

deletion_field.info: When this parameter is provided, documents in the target collection with metadata field values matching the input metadata field value will be deleted before new data is loaded.
deletion_field.name: deletion_field

embedding_model.info: Specify the Embedding Model. Not required for Astra Vectorize collections.
embedding_model.name: embedding_model

environment.info: The environment for the Astra DB API Endpoint.
environment.name: environment

ignore_invalid_documents.info: Boolean flag to determine whether to ignore invalid documents at runtime.
ignore_invalid_documents.name: ignore_invalid_documents

keyspace.info: Optional keyspace within Astra DB to use for the collection.
keyspace.name: keyspace

lexical_terms.info: Add additional terms/keywords to augment search precision.
lexical_terms.name: lexical_terms

number_of_results.info: Number of search results to return.
number_of_results.name: number_of_results

reranker.info: Post-retrieval model that re-scores results for optimal relevance ranking.
reranker.name: reranker

search_method.info: Determine how your content is matched: Vector finds semantic similarity, and Hybrid Search (suggested) combines both approaches with a reranker.
search_method.name: search_method

search_query.info: Enter a query to run a similarity search.
search_query.name: search_query

search_score_threshold.info: Minimum similarity score threshold for search results. (when using 'Similarity with score threshold')
search_score_threshold.name: search_score_threshold

should_cache_vector_store.info: If True, the vector store will be cached for the current build of the component. This is useful for components that have multiple output methods and want to share the same vector store.
should_cache_vector_store.name: should_cache_vector_store

token.info: Authentication token for accessing Astra DB.
token.name: token

data.description: Convert between different types (Message, Data, DataFrame)

auto_parse.info: Detect and convert JSON/CSV strings automatically.
auto_parse.name: auto_parse

input_data.info: Accept Message, Data or DataFrame as input
input_data.name: input_data

output_type.info: Select the desired output data type
output_type.name: output_type

data.description: Routes an input message using LLM-based categorization.

custom_prompt.info: Additional instructions for LLM-based categorization. These will be added to the base prompt. Use {input_text} for the input text and {routes} for the available categories.
custom_prompt.name: custom_prompt
custom_prompt.value: Send to HR route if the document is a resume and should go to the HR team. Send to Legal if the document is a contract or agreement.

enable_else_output.info: Include an Else output for cases that don't match any route.
enable_else_output.name: enable_else_output

input_text.info: The primary text input for the operation.
input_text.name: input_text

message.info: Optional override message that will replace both the Input and Output Value for all routes when filled.
message.name: message

routes.info: Define the categories for routing. Each row should have a route/category name and optionally a custom output value.
routes.name: routes

environment.info: The environment for the Astra DB API Endpoint.
environment.name: environment

ignore_invalid_documents.info: Boolean flag to determine whether to ignore invalid documents at runtime.
ignore_invalid_documents.name: ignore_invalid_documents

keyspace.info: Optional keyspace within Astra DB to use for the collection.
keyspace.name: keyspace

lexical_terms.info: Add additional terms/keywords to augment search precision.
lexical_terms.name: lexical_terms

number_of_results.info: Number of search results to return.
number_of_results.name: number_of_results

reranker.info: Post-retrieval model that re-scores results for optimal relevance ranking.
reranker.name: reranker

search_method.info: Determine how your content is matched: Vector finds semantic similarity, and Hybrid Search (suggested) combines both approaches with a reranker.
search_method.name: search_method

search_query.info: Enter a query to run a similarity search.
search_query.name: search_query

search_score_threshold.info: Minimum similarity score threshold for search results. (when using 'Similarity with score threshold')
search_score_threshold.name: search_score_threshold

should_cache_vector_store.info: If True, the vector store will be cached for the current build of the component. This is useful for components that have multiple output methods and want to share the same vector store.
should_cache_vector_store.name: should_cache_vector_store

token.info: Authentication token for accessing Astra DB.
token.name: token

data.description: Display a chat message in the Playground.

clean_data.info: Whether to clean data before converting to string.
clean_data.name: clean_data

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.
data_template.name: data_template

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

data.description: Convert between different types (Message, Data, DataFrame)

auto_parse.info: Detect and convert JSON/CSV strings automatically.
auto_parse.name: auto_parse

input_data.info: Accept Message, Data or DataFrame as input
input_data.name: input_data

output_type.info: Select the desired output data type
output_type.name: output_type

data.description: Generate embeddings using a specified provider.

api_base.info: Base URL for the API. Leave empty for default.
api_base.name: api_base

base_url_ibm_watsonx.info: The base URL of the API (IBM watsonx.ai only)
base_url_ibm_watsonx.name: base_url_ibm_watsonx

dimensions.info: The number of dimensions the resulting output embeddings should have. Only supported by certain models.
dimensions.name: dimensions

input_text.display_name: Include the original text in the output
input_text.name: input_text

model_kwargs.info: Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.
model_kwargs.name: model_kwargs

project_id.info: IBM watsonx.ai Project ID (required for IBM watsonx.ai)
project_id.name: project_id

data.description: Display a chat message in the Playground.

clean_data.info: Whether to clean data before converting to string.
clean_data.name: clean_data

context_id.info: The context ID of the chat. Adds an extra layer to the local memory.
context_id.name: context_id

data_template.info: Template to convert Data to Text. If left empty, it will be dynamically set to the Data's text key.
data_template.name: data_template

input_value.info: Message to be passed as output.
input_value.name: input_value

session_id.info: The session ID of the chat. If empty, the current session ID parameter will be used.
session_id.name: session_id

should_store_message.info: Store the message in the history.
should_store_message.name: should_store_message

data.description: Implementation of Graph Vector Store using Astra DB

api_endpoint.info: API endpoint URL for the Astra DB service.
api_endpoint.name: api_endpoint

batch_size.info: Optional number of data to process in a single batch.
batch_size.name: batch_size

bulk_delete_concurrency.info: Optional concurrency level for bulk delete operations.
bulk_delete_concurrency.name: bulk_delete_concurrency

bulk_insert_batch_concurrency.info: Optional concurrency level for bulk insert operations.
bulk_insert_batch_concurrency.name: bulk_insert_batch_concurrency

bulk_insert_overwrite_concurrency.info: Optional concurrency level for bulk insert operations that overwrite existing data.
bulk_insert_overwrite_concurrency.name: bulk_insert_overwrite_concurrency

collection_indexing_policy.info: Optional JSON string for the "indexing" field of the collection. See https://docs.datastax.com/en/astra-db-serverless/api-reference/collections.html#the-indexing-option
collection_indexing_policy.name: collection_indexing_policy

collection_name.info: The name of the collection within Astra DB where the vectors will be stored.
collection_name.name: collection_name

keyspace.info: Optional keyspace within Astra DB to use for the collection.
keyspace.name: keyspace

metadata_incoming_links_key.info: Metadata key used for incoming links.
metadata_incoming_links_key.name: metadata_incoming_links_key

metadata_indexing_exclude.info: Optional list of metadata fields to exclude from the indexing.
metadata_indexing_exclude.name: metadata_indexing_exclude

metadata_indexing_include.info: Optional list of metadata fields to include in the indexing.
metadata_indexing_include.name: metadata_indexing_include

metric.info: Optional distance metric for vector comparisons in the vector store.
metric.name: metric

pre_delete_collection.info: Boolean flag to determine whether to delete the collection before creating a new one.
pre_delete_collection.name: pre_delete_collection

search_filter.info: Optional dictionary of filters to apply to the search query.
search_filter.name: search_filter

search_query.info: Enter a query to run a similarity search.
search_query.name: search_query

search_score_threshold.info: Minimum similarity score threshold for search results. (when using 'Similarity with score threshold')
search_score_threshold.name: search_score_threshold

setup_mode.info: Configuration mode for setting up the vector store, with options like 'Sync', or 'Off'.
setup_mode.name: setup_mode

should_cache_vector_store.info: If True, the vector store will be cached for the current build of the component. This is useful for components that have multiple output methods and want to share the same vector store.
should_cache_vector_store.name: should_cache_vector_store

token.info: Authentication token for accessing Astra DB.
token.name: token

description: The Power of Language at Your Fingertips.
name: semantic_memory
